nasb.text: They have heard that I groan; There is no one to comfort me; All my enemies have heard of my calamity; They are glad that You have done it. Oh, that You would bring the day which You have proclaimed, That they may become like me.

esv.text: “They heard  my groaning, yet there is no one to comfort me. All my enemies have heard of my trouble; they are glad that you have done it. You have brought the day you announced; now let them be as I am.

cnv.text: 有人聽見我的唉哼，卻沒有人安慰我， 我所有的仇敵都聽見我的災難；你作了這事，他們就歡樂。 願你使你所宣告的日子來臨那時，他們就必像我一樣。

ccb.text: “人们听见我的哀叹， 却无人安慰我。 敌人看见你降给我的灾难， 都幸灾乐祸。 愿你应许的审判之日来临， 叫他们像我一样受苦！
